name: sigillo-app
description: Self-hostable secret sharing app — authenticates via sigillo provider

scripts.dev: pnpm db:migrate:local && tuistory launch -s sigillo-app-dev --attach 'pnpm vite dev'
scripts.db:migrate:prod: echo "D1 pre-migration timestamp: $(date +%s)" && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.db:migrate:preview: echo "D1 pre-migration timestamp: $(date +%s)" && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env preview
scripts.deployment: pnpm db:migrate:preview && CLOUDFLARE_ENV=preview pnpm build && wrangler deploy --env preview
scripts.deployment:prod: pnpm db:migrate:prod && pnpm build && wrangler deploy

BETTER_AUTH_SECRET.description: Any random string used to sign auth sessions and cookies. No length or format requirement. Generate with `openssl rand -base64 32`.

ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: **Optional.** Must be exactly 32 bytes, base64-encoded (44 characters). Used for AES-256-GCM encryption of secrets at rest. Generate with `openssl rand -base64 32`. If omitted, a key is derived from BETTER_AUTH_SECRET automatically.
